## How to verify

<!-- Commands to run, screens to check, logs to read. -->

- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] Tests cover the change (or it's a docs/style PR)
- [ ] `docs/GUIDE.md` and `docs/CLAUDE.md` updated if user-facing behaviour changed
